title: General Caster - How to push Employee Name to a column
excerpt: Could someone tell me the parameter I would to get the people column to spit out a name to a text column with General Caster.  I know I can use formula {item’s Person#name} for the monday formula but I’m trying to get a …

posts.author: tigger2000ttfn (Michael )
posts.cookedHtml: Could someone tell me the parameter I would to get the people column to spit out a name to a text column with General Caster. I know I can use formula {item’s Person#name} for the monday formula but I’m trying to get a text value I can use for other things.
